summary: Frontend-only testing of Rare Shot Live Wallpaper app. All major features working correctly. Splash screen loads with RARE SHOT animation, transitions to home screen with nature wallpaper, time/date, leaf particles, volume widget, 5-tab navigation, and settings. All screens verified via playwright.

ui_bugs.issue: Widget (position: absolute, bottom: 90) overlaps scrollable content on Photos, Music, Effects, and Settings screens. Users must scroll past widget to see content below it. Consider adding paddingBottom to scrollable screens equal to widget height (~130px).
Second wallpaper item (Autumn Leaves) thumbnail appears blank/very small in screenshot. Could be image loading issue or layout rendering bug in web preview.

integration_issues.issue: Play station error: NotAllowedError - play() failed because user didn't interact with document first. Expected browser policy restriction, not an issue on Android. Fine for production APK.

issues: expo-av deprecation warning in console - should migrate to expo-audio/expo-video for SDK 54+ compatibility

action_items: Add paddingBottom to ScrollView/FlatList in Photos, Music, Effects, and Settings screens to account for VolumeWidget height (~130px) so bottom content isn't covered by the floating widget
Investigate blank Autumn Leaves thumbnail in Photos grid
Consider migrating from expo-av to expo-audio before SDK 54 deprecation
critical_code_review_comments: expo-av is deprecated in SDK 53 and will be removed in SDK 54 - plan migration to expo-audio/expo-video
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 tabs (Home, Photos, Videos, Music, Effects) and Settings screen are working. Volume widget collapse/expand tested and working. 10 radio stations present in constants (need to scroll in Music tab). Particle effects (Leaves active by default) visible on home screen. Splash screen shows RARE SHOT animation then transitions to home screen. Main issue: floating VolumeWidget overlaps bottom content on non-home screens.
rca_of_issue: VolumeWidget is rendered in _layout.tsx as an absolute positioned overlay at bottom:90. On home screen this is fine as it overlays the wallpaper. On tab screens with scrollable content (Photos, Music, Effects, Settings), the widget covers the bottom ~130px of content. Fix: add contentContainerStyle paddingBottom={140} to all scroll containers in Photos, Music, Effects, and Settings screens.
